h1.content: display: inline-block; font-weight: bold; color: #E65100; background: linear-gradient(to right, #FFE0B2, #FFCC80); padding: 8px 24px; border-radius: 25px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(255,152,0,0.3);

h2.content: font-weight: bold; color: #F57C00; padding-left: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #FFB74D; background: linear-gradient(to right, #FFF8E1, transparent);

code.block: color: #5D4037; background: #FFF8E1; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #FFE0B2; margin: 1.2em 0; padding: 1em; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap;
code.inline: background: #FFE0B2; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; color: #E65100; font-size: 14px; border: none;

styles.quote: border-left: 4px solid #FFB74D; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 14px 18px 15px 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8E1 0%, #FFECB3 100%); margin: 0.8em 0; color: #E65100; font-style: normal;
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1em auto; display: block; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255,152,0,0.2);
styles.link: color: #FF9800; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px dashed #FFB74D; font-weight: 500;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border: 1px solid #FFE0B2; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
table.header: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFE0B2 0%, #FFCC80 100%); font-weight: bold; color: #E65100; font-size: 1em;
